uat-failures-format.description: Structured UAT failure artifact with embedded JSON metadata block (<!-- UAT-FAILURES-META {...} -->) containing an array of failure objects with fields: id, criterion, step, description, severity, relevantFiles. Written by the UAT skill after human-driven testing.

uat-skill-rewrite.description: Rewritten UAT skill implementing human-driven step-by-step workflow via AskUserQuestion loop. Removes automated browser execution. Produces UAT-FAILURES.md on failures.

uat-role-rewrite.description: Rewritten UAT role that generates test plans only (no execution). Agent produces step-by-step human verification checklist.

human-driven-loop.description: Each UAT step must pause for human pass/fail input via AskUserQuestion. No automated browser execution occurs during UAT.

failure-file-parseable.description: UAT-FAILURES.md must contain an embedded JSON metadata block that can be parsed by JSON.parse() after extraction from the HTML comment wrapper.

definition.scope: Replace the automation+human hybrid UAT with a fully human-driven step-by-step workflow. Define the UAT-FAILURES.md format as a shared contract for downstream consumers.

tasks.description: Rewrite skills/uat/SKILL.md for human-driven step-by-step loop
tasks.acceptance: UAT skill presents each step via AskUserQuestion and records pass/fail

tasks.description: Rewrite src/modules/roles/role-uat.md to generate plans only
tasks.acceptance: UAT role produces test plan without executing browser automation

tasks.description: Define and implement UAT-FAILURES.md format with embedded JSON
tasks.acceptance: Failure file is parseable by JSON.parse on extracted metadata block

tasks.description: Write unit tests for UAT failure file format parsing
tasks.acceptance: Tests verify round-trip write/parse of UAT-FAILURES.md

acceptance: UAT workflow is fully human-driven with no automated browser execution
UAT-FAILURES.md is produced with parseable embedded JSON metadata
